name: Barbecue Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large, shallow baking pan.
2. Add 1 1/2 squeezed lemons and everything except the shrimp. Let simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Wash the shrimp, leaving the shells on, and place them in the pan. Baste the shrimp.
4. Bake at 350 degrees until the shrimp are pink on top, about 5-8 minutes.
5. Turn the shrimp, salt, and pepper lightly, and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Squeeze half a lemon and a few dashes of Worcestershire sauce over the top.
7. Serve with French bread for dipping in the great sauce. Makes 4 servings.
This recipe is from the New Orleans Times-Picayune Cooking Contest, 1980. Gail B.
